sections.title: Able To — Introduction and Formula
sections.explanation: Able To is an essential building block of English grammar. Formula: Subject + am/is/are + able to + base verb (ability, formal alternative to "can"). Rules: 'Able to' expresses ability, similar to 'can' but usable in all tenses | Formula: am/is/are + able to (present); was/were + able to (past); will be able to (future) | Negative: am/is/are not able to | Useful because 'can' cannot combine with modals — you say 'will be able to', not 'will can'
sections.formula: Subject + am/is/are + able to + base verb (ability, formal alternative to "can")

examples.hindi: मैं यह काम कर पाता हूँ।
examples.english: I am able to do this work.

examples.hindi: वह तेज़ दौड़ पाती है।
examples.english: She is able to run fast.

examples.hindi: मैं कल यह पूरा कर पाया।
examples.english: I was able to complete this yesterday.

examples.hindi: हम कल तक यह खत्म कर पाएंगे।
examples.english: We will be able to finish this by tomorrow.

examples.hindi: वह इस समस्या को हल कर पाया।
examples.english: He was able to solve this problem.

examples.hindi: क्या तुम यह समझ पाते हो?
examples.english: Are you able to understand this?

sections.title: Able To — Daily Life Usage
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Able To for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Subject + am/is/are + able to + base verb (ability, formal alternative to "can")

examples.hindi: मैं यह सीख पाया।
examples.english: I was able to learn this.

examples.hindi: वे इस target को हासिल कर पाएंगे।
examples.english: They will be able to achieve this target.

examples.hindi: हम एक साथ काम कर पाते हैं।
examples.english: We are able to work together.

examples.hindi: वह पहले तैर नहीं पाता था।
examples.english: He was not able to swim before.

examples.hindi: क्या तुम इसे समय पर कर पाओगे?
examples.english: Will you be able to do this on time?

examples.hindi: मैं इसे ठीक कर पाया।
examples.english: I was able to fix this.

sections.title: Able To — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Able To — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Able To in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Subject + am/is/are + able to + base verb (ability, formal alternative to "can")

examples.hindi: वह किसी भी भाषा सीख पाती है।
examples.english: She is able to learn any language.

examples.hindi: हम अपनी गलती सुधार पाए।
examples.english: We were able to correct our mistake.

examples.hindi: वे यह मौका पा पाएंगे।
examples.english: They will be able to get this opportunity.

examples.hindi: मैं यह पहले नहीं समझ पाता था।
examples.english: I was not able to understand this before.

sections.title: Able To — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Able To — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Able To. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Subject + am/is/are + able to + base verb (ability, formal alternative to "can")

examples.hindi: क्या वह यह पूरा कर पाएगा?
examples.english: Will he be able to complete this?

examples.hindi: हम इस challenge को स्वीकार कर पाए।
examples.english: We were able to accept this challenge.

examples.hindi: वह जल्दी फैसला ले पाती है।
examples.english: She is able to make quick decisions.

examples.hindi: मैं आज यह मुश्किल काम कर पाया।
examples.english: I was able to do this difficult work today.
